BOUKEZOULA Tayeb Fakhreddine
BOUKEZOULA Tayeb Fakhreddine
Grade:Maitre de conferences classe A
Grade:Maitre de conferences classe A
Email:fakhreddine.boukezoula@univ-setif.dz

Bureau:20

Dr Tayeb Fakhreddine Boukezoula is a Prof in the chemistry department at Ferhat Abbas University, Sétif 1, Algeria, where he is also a member of the LGPC lab. In the field of process engineering, chemical engineering option, he has obtained the following diplomas: State engineer, Magister and doctorate of science at Ferhat Abbas University, Sétif 1, Algeria. His research interests include modeling and simulation of industrial reactors. He has published research articles in scientific journals.
